game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Primee!** "Primee!" is a fast-paced puzzle action game where players identify and interact with falling number balls within a 60-120 second time limit. Numbers continuously spawn from the top of the screen, falling downwards at increasing speeds, and players must tap a number if it is prime, earning points equal to its value. If a falling number is composite, players must swipe across it to "cut" it, which instantly decomposes it into its prime factors (e.g., swiping 6 yields 2 and 3), then quickly tap each resulting prime factor for points. Tapping a composite number directly results in a score penalty (e.g., -5 points), and any number that falls off the bottom of the screen without interaction is lost. The game features 5 difficulty levels, unlocked by achieving specific score milestones, which increase the spawn rate of numbers (e.g., from 1 every 2 seconds to 1 every 0.8 seconds) and introduce larger, more complex numbers to factorize.
game_info.description: Welcome to Primee! Your mission is to process falling number balls before they hit the bottom. Prime numbers earn you points when you tap them (Space), but composite numbers must be sliced (Z key) to break them into their prime factors, then tapped individually. Be careful - tapping a composite costs you points! Progress through 5 difficulty levels by reaching score milestones, facing faster spawns and larger numbers as you advance.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move player left and right
Space: Tap/collect a number (only works for primes!)
Z: Slice/cut a composite number to factorize it
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and prime number collection. Validates that the player can move across the screen and successfully tap prime numbers to earn points without penalties.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character horizontally to intercept falling prime numbers and tap them using the space key. Avoid composite numbers initially to ensure clean score accumulation.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully collects multiple prime numbers, score increases accordingly, and no penalties are incurred. Movement is smooth and collision detection works correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete winning strategy by processing both prime and composite numbers efficiently. This validates that the slice-and-tap mechanic works correctly and that the player can achieve the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively move to intercept all falling numbers. Slice composite numbers with Z to factorize them, then quickly tap the resulting prime factors. Directly tap prime numbers. Maintain high efficiency to reach the winning score threshold.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches the winning score milestone (300+ points) within the time limit, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN. All game mechanics work correctly including slicing, factorization, and prime detection.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests penalty system and error handling by intentionally tapping composite numbers without slicing them first. Validates that the game correctly applies penalties and continues functioning.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Move to composite numbers and attempt to tap them directly without slicing. Observe penalty application and ensure game state remains consistent.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Score decreases by penalty amount when composite numbers are tapped incorrectly. Game continues to function normally and no errors occur from invalid interactions.
